    def __init__(self, name, type, size, alignment, is_array=False):
        self.name = name
        self.type = type
        self.size = size
        self.alignment = alignment
        self.is_array = is_array

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"{self.name}({self.type}, {self.size}, {self.alignment}, {self.is_array})"

    def __str__(self):
        return f"{self.name}({self.type}, {self.size}, {self.alignment},
